3037358.title: SpongeBob
3037358.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3037432.title: SpongeBob
3037432.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3038203.title: SpongeBob
3038203.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3038303.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3038303.description: Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the beautiful Princess of England! Problem is, he has to convince Brittany he's worthy.

3038336.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3038336.description: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they saved the tree from being cut down, and made it their home.

3038367.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3038367.description: Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to thwart his departure and keep him at home.

3038409.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3038409.description: When Skipper is knocked on the head, he's unable to lead the penguins on an important mission. / Private accidentally drinks Kowalski's truth serum and starts spilling the penguin's secrets to the rest of the zoo.

3039239.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3039239.description: The lemurs argue, and Maurice and Mort move out of the habitat. Lonely Julien starts bugging the penguins, who decide they must get the lemurs back together. / A tiny frog with a nasty attitude moves to the zoo and starts terrorizing the animals.

3039296.title: Huize Herrie
3039296.description: Eager to be named Kings of the Con at the Ace Savvy convention, Lincoln and Clyde convince the sisters to go with them as the Full Deck. // But the girls get more attention, leading the boys to do whatever it takes to gain focus.

3039385.title: The Loud House
3039385.description: To get out of doing things they don't like, Lana and Lola secretly switch places and pretend to be the other. // After causing Flip to get hurt, the kids sneak him into the attic to care for him without Mom and Dad knowing.

3040214.title: De Casagrandes
3040214.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid look for an after-school activity to do together, but nothing seems to be right for them both. // When Maria finally gets a day off, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for some much-needed quality time.

3040280.title: De Casagrandes
3040280.description: Ronnie Anne forgoes a family Halloween tradition for a "cool" party but learns "cool" doesn't always mean "fun." / Trying to help Adelaide to get over the death of her frog, Ronnie Anne and Sid teach her about Day of the Dead.

3040370.title: SpongeBob
3040370.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3041202.title: SpongeBob
3041202.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3041257.title: SpongeBob
3041257.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3041311.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3041311.description: Captain Man & Kid Danger race against the clock to stop Daddy Longlegs from unleashing his army of spiders on Swellview.

3041380.title: Breadwinners
3041380.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce meet their match when two punker cranes start delivering pizza on their turf. // Buhdeuce has a bad day, so he eats Yeasterday Bread, reliving the same day over and over with bad results for SwaySway.

3042180.title: Dorg van Dango
3042180.description: A jealous Dorg steal his sister's Jumpsy Boots, only to have a garbage truck pick them up and drive away! // Dorg and the gang cast a spell to cool things down during a heatwave.

3042240.title: Sanjay & Craig
3042240.description: Things spiral out of control when Sanjay goes to ridiculous lengths to conceal that he and Craig were using Darlene's makeup kit. // Sanjay takes credit for Craig's invention, but ends up almost losing his best friend.

3042334.title: Sanjay & Craig
3042334.description: Sanjay and Craig try to find the 'hook' to help a boring puppy find a home. // What starts as Sanjay and Craig playing a schoolyard game turns into a mythic adventure involving a girl in trouble, Darlene and a villain called the Butt Master.

3043074.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3043074.description: The rats have been terrorizing Roger the alligator. He asks the penguins for help. Their solution: swap Roger's brain with Rico's, and let the but kicking begin! / A robot is sent to the zoo to learn the habits of lemurs before it's sent into space.

3043147.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3043147.description: Marlene goes over to meet the newest zoo animal, and she mysteriously disappears. The penguins and lemurs try to rescue her, but they are taken, too.

3043203.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3043203.description: Creatures that feed off dreams trap the Turtles inside their own dreams as April and Casey must find a way to wake them up.

3043284.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3043284.description: Casey and Donnie bond over building Casey's new hot rod, but their newfound friendship is challenged by Speed Demon, a hot-rodding mutant who is terrorizing the roads.

3044003.title: Ollie's Pack
3044003.description: Ollie's stinky sweat is a hot commodity in the Monsterverse, and makes a deal in exchange for it. // Ollie, Cleo and Bernie need to make an epic superhero movie to save Portshill High's Film Club.

3044087.title: SpongeBob
3044087.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3044178.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3044178.description: When Po learns a kung fu move that can erase someone's short-term memory, he takes it too far.

3044789.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3044789.description: When a rhino comes to the Valley of Peace seeking to destroy the Dragon Warrior, Po tries to befriend him before he discovers Po's true identity.

3044889.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044889.description: Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to thwart his departure and keep him at home.

3044928.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044928.description: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Talk about the Odd Couple.

3044955.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044955.description: Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. He's smart, funny, and shares Simon's love of Science. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon to get in with the cool crowd. Can the brothers survive this new friend?

3044994.title: SpongeBob
3044994.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3045786.title: SpongeBob
3045786.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3045869.title: De Casagrandes
3045869.description: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their Dad's new apartment permanently. // Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of "El Cucuy," and learns that this story may not be fiction.

3045947.title: The Loud House
3045947.description: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

3046664.title: The Loud House
3046664.description: Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

3046714.title: Hier is Pony
3046714.description: Annie is worried that Dad will see Pony as useless to the farm and get rid of him. // Annie is set to play in the soccer game, but when she gets between Pony and Dog in a fight Pony accidentally stomps on her foot.

3046787.title: SpongeBob
3046787.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3046870.title: SpongeBob
3046870.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3047484.title: SpongeBob
3047484.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3047577.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3047577.description: Leo fears his act of mercy has come back to haunt him when Xever holds a local noodle shop owner hostage.

3047646.title: The Loud House
3047646.description: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot. // After Lucy reads Lincoln's fortune and claims his day will 'end in disaster', Lincoln becomes a hypochondriac.

3048348.title: The Loud House
3048348.description: It's the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln's sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

3048432.title: De Casagrandes
3048432.description: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. // When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

3048512.title: SpongeBob
3048512.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3009141.title: SpongeBob
3009141.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3049398.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
3049398.description: Katara eventually defeats Azula by trapping her in ice, and heals Zuko. Sokka, Toph and Suki destroy the airship fleet.

3049485.title: Avatar
3049485.description: When a young waterbender, named Katara, and her brother, Sokka, discover a giant iceberg while fishing for food around their homestead at the South Pole, they discover that there is a boy, named Aang, inside.

3050177.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3050177.description: When Timmy realizes that everyone in Dimmsdale has a pet except him, he adopts Sparky, a mischievous fairy dog. But owning a fairy dog proves to be a much bigger challenge than Timmy could have ever predicted.

3050216.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3050216.description: Cosmo loses his wand and Timmy and the gang must help find it.

3050264.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3050264.description: Po is excited when he discovers a kung fu prodigy, but starts to worry when people seem to prefer the new kid to their beloved Dragon Warrior.

3050330.title: Ollie's Pack
3050330.description: When monster bounty hunter, Ashlor shows up looking for Ollie and his pals, they hide out with Rance. // Ollie finds himself on trial, in monster court for misusing the pack.

3050614.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3050614.description: Just like every year, Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's whoa! Love at first sight!

3050652.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3050652.description: When Theodore disappears from his bed, leaving a blob of sticky, green slime behind, Alvin is POSITIVE that he has been kidnapped by aliens!With the help of Simon and his home-made high-tech gear, they are ready to fight the aliens and save their brother.

3050685.title: The Loud House
3050685.description: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

3050752.title: De Casagrandes
3050752.description: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it! // Ronnie Anne and her friends uncover a town mystery: what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart?

3050831.title: SpongeBob
3050831.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.
